execute_steps: grep applyThinkingPreset ProviderModal.vue 确认 deepseek 预设值 = {minimal:null,low:null,medium:null,high:'high',xhigh:'max'}
grep 确认 template 中有 @click=applyThinkingPreset('deepseek') 按钮

execute_steps: sed -n '/applyThinkingPreset/,/^}/p' ProviderModal.vue 确认 else 分支设 thinkingLevelMap = undefined
grep 确认 template 中有 @click=applyThinkingPreset('clear') 按钮
code_review: undefined 值会被 ConfigService merge 逻辑正确处理（delete model.thinkingLevelMap）
test_execution.evidence: function source verified, clear sets undefined correctly

确认列表中不含 'max'

execute_steps: code_review: InputToolbar thinkingLevels computed 中 filter 逻辑，thinkingLevelMap key 对应 null 时排除该 level
DeepSeek 预设 {minimal:null,low:null,medium:null,high:'high',xhigh:'max'} → 过滤后 picker 显示 off(不在map中), high, xhigh
ALL_THINKING_LEVELS 不含 'max'，map 中 'max' 仅作为 xhigh 的映射值出现
test_execution.evidence: code review of InputToolbar filter logic confirms correct filtering

execute_steps: grep setThinkingLevel ChatInput.vue 确认 @select-thinking-level handler 存在
确认 emit('send-command', {type:'session.setThinkingLevel', payload:{sessionId, level:l}}) 在发送消息前触发
